entries.quote: 2025 was the year India proved that financial innovation can be both deeply inclusive and globally scalable. With UPI now powering over 80% of all digital payments, it is clear that the next wave of growth will come from new behaviors such as conversational and agentic payments, biometric payments and intelligent cross-border flows.
entries.signal: Cashfree is positioning for the agentic/AI payments layer and cross-border flows as its next growth frontier, beyond domestic payment rails.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes the domestic UPI market is structurally won and future value lies in behavioural and geographic expansion — cross-border and AI-native payment experiences.
